role: Product Lead / Head of Product, AI Platform for padel

verdict_legend.STRONG: Demonstrated by a verifiable artifact; defensible without caveat.
verdict_legend.PARTIAL: Adjacent evidence exists; gap acknowledged with concrete closure plan.
verdict_legend.GAP: No evidence on file; closure plan with role-week deadline.

required_bullets.ru: Опыт запуска цифровых продуктов с нуля
required_bullets.en: Experience launching digital products from scratch
required_bullets.rationale: The padel-research-os repository itself is a from-zero digital artefact (multi-agent pipeline, static HTML brief, Vercel/GH-Pages deploy). Whether the candidate has independently shipped a revenue-generating product remains to be confirmed in screening.
required_bullets.closure_plan: Bring two zero-to-launch case briefs to the screening call: one technical (pipeline architecture from this repo), one commercial (prior product or side-launch with date, scope, retained users). Anchor commercial example with screenshots or a public link if available; otherwise frame transparently as 'to discuss in screening'. Deadline: pre-call deck, before role-week 1.

required_bullets.ru: Опыт работы с MVP, быстрыми гипотезами и пользовательскими интервью
required_bullets.en: Experience with MVPs, rapid hypotheses, and user interviews
required_bullets.rationale: Blueprint defines four kill-experiments with explicit hypothesis, kill-criterion, and evidence-required triplets. Capability map sorts every value-mechanic by ship_solo / ship_solo_with_apis / requires_partner band. Sibling brief 03_mvp_loop_design.md formalises the smoke-test → drill-plan → coach-pilot loop.

required_bullets.en: Understanding of unit economics, funnels, retention, LTV/CAC
required_bullets.rationale: Sibling brief 02_subscription_economics.md models LTV/CAC, payback, and retention bands. Direct-readership newsletter capability targets ≤USD 12 acquisition cost (Foundry CRO 2026 anchor). Coach renewal chain is modelled as a separate cohort. CLAUDE.md mandates Python-sandbox arithmetic — no LLM math.

required_bullets.ru: Опыт в продуктах с подпиской, регулярной оплатой или повторными покупками
required_bullets.en: Experience with subscription, recurring-payment, or repeat-purchase products
required_bullets.rationale: Subscription mechanics modelled as a research artefact (sibling brief 02). Direct line-of-sight to a prior subscription product not yet on file. Coach renewal pilot (CH-002, CH-007) is the proposed first hands-on subscription cycle in role.
required_bullets.closure_plan: Bring one prior subscription or recurring-revenue example with retained-cohort numbers to the screening (B2C SaaS, B2B retainer, or e-commerce repeat-purchase). If none, propose a 14-day prepaid drill-plan as the first paid loop in role-week 4 to shorten the gap to revenue. Deadline: hypothesis live by role-week 4, first cohort by role-week 6.

required_bullets.ru: Умение работать с неопределённостью и ранней стадией проекта
required_bullets.en: Ability to work with uncertainty and early-stage projects
required_bullets.rationale: Entire pipeline is structured around stated stage: AURA = 'understanding' with explicit entry/exit signals. Capability bands segregate ship_solo vs requires_partner vs requires_capital. Kill criteria are pre-declared, not retro-fitted. ABSENT/INFERRED/VERIFIED tagging is the operating discipline for unknowns.

required_bullets.ru: Способность переводить стратегические идеи основателя в roadmap, задачи и релизы
required_bullets.en: Ability to translate founder strategy into roadmap, tasks, and releases
required_bullets.rationale: Sibling brief 04_30_60_90_plan.md is a literal demonstration: founder-level prompt converted into 16 numbered prompt files, 12 agents, 7 quality gates, and a sequenced release plan with first-observable-output per capability. Every capability row carries first_observable_output and kill_signal — the format expected by a Product Lead.

required_bullets.ru: Опыт управления кросс-функциональной командой: разработка, дизайн, аналитика, операционка
required_bullets.en: Cross-functional team management: engineering, design, analytics, operations
required_bullets.rationale: The 12-agent orchestration is a credible analogue for cross-functional coordination (planning, deep-research workers, structured extraction, synthesis, red-team, render). Direct line-management of human eng/design/analytics/ops teams is not on file from the research artefact alone.
required_bullets.closure_plan: Bring one prior cross-functional team brief to the screening: team size, disciplines covered, the one decision that required arbitration across two functions, and the outcome. If padel role expects line management, propose role-week 1-2 as a structured 1:1 round with each function head plus a written team operating rhythm by role-week 3.

required_bullets.ru: Умение работать с данными и формулировать требования к аналитике
required_bullets.en: Ability to work with data and define analytics requirements
required_bullets.rationale: Every claim in the research brief is tagged VERIFIED / INFERRED / ABSENT and sourced. check_citations.py fails the build if any number lacks a source. Numeric claims pass through a Python sandbox (calculation_method == python_subprocess_executed). Evidence map is a verbatim trace from claim to URL.

nice_to_have_bullets.ru: Опыт в sport-tech, health-tech, fitness-tech, edtech, marketplace или community-продуктах
nice_to_have_bullets.en: Experience in sport-tech, health-tech, fitness-tech, edtech, marketplace, or community products
nice_to_have_bullets.rationale: Sport-tech research is on the public portfolio (peer cards on Padelytics, PlaySight, Hudl, Wingfield, Eyes On Padel). Hands-on operating experience inside a sport-tech, health-tech, or marketplace product not yet confirmed.
nice_to_have_bullets.closure_plan: Confirm any prior product exposure in adjacent verticals during the screening call (one paragraph, dates, scope). If none, position the 12-peer competitor matrix and the AURA-graded segment work as the operating substitute and propose role-week 1 founder-shadowing as the on-ramp.

nice_to_have_bullets.en: Experience launching a product with an AI/ML/CV component
nice_to_have_bullets.rationale: The research-os pipeline routes work across Claude Opus 4.7, Claude Haiku 4.5, Sonar Deep Research, Tongyi DeepResearch 30B, and o4-mini deep-research with explicit cost/quality tradeoffs per stage. Capability map names Joao-M-Silva/padel_analytics as the verified OSS CV anchor and ties each value-mechanic to a kill_signal.

nice_to_have_bullets.ru: Понимание спортивных рейтингов, тренировочных систем, академий или клубных моделей
nice_to_have_bullets.en: Understanding of sports ratings, training systems, academies, or club models
nice_to_have_bullets.rationale: Research surfaces the rating-portability problem (Playtomic / MATCHi self-declared levels do not travel) and the coach renewal chain. Sibling brief 03 sketches the academy and pair-level loops. Operating-level fluency in a real academy P&L or a federation rating committee not on file.
nice_to_have_bullets.closure_plan: Two-track plan. Track A (research depth, role-weeks 1-2): three 45-minute interviews with FEP / FITP / PadelFIP-affiliated coaches, recorded and tagged into AJTBD. Track B (operating depth, role-weeks 3-4): one half-day shadow at a Spanish or Italian academy plus a co-creation contract with the head coach to test the drill-prescription engine on real students.

nice_to_have_bullets.ru: Личный интерес к паделу или опыт игры
nice_to_have_bullets.en: Personal interest in padel or playing experience
nice_to_have_bullets.rationale: The candidate has not been disclosed as a padel player. Domain immersion comes from the research artefact, not from on-court experience. Pretending otherwise would fail the red-team gate inside the candidate's own pipeline.
nice_to_have_bullets.closure_plan: Three-step closure inside the first 90 days. (1) Role-week 1: complete a beginner padel clinic with a FEP-credentialed coach, log every JTBD friction in the candidate's own AJTBD format. (2) Role-weeks 1-4: shadow two academy coaches per week (one in Madrid, one remote video). (3) Role-weeks 4-12: enter a coach co-creation contract — a named coach is the design partner for the drill-prescription engine, with weekly written feedback. Frame openly in screening as the 'fresh JTBD lens' pivot rather than a deficit.

nice_to_have_bullets.ru: Опыт запуска продуктов в международном контексте
nice_to_have_bullets.en: Experience launching products in an international context
nice_to_have_bullets.rationale: Geography strategy spans five priority markets (Spain, Italy, UAE, US, CIS) with explicit GDPR / 152-FZ split. Localisation capability VM-008 ships Spanish + Russian recap. Direct prior multi-country launch experience not yet on file.
nice_to_have_bullets.closure_plan: Bring one prior international touchpoint to the screening (any: cross-border launch, partner integration, foreign-market customer interviews). If none, propose role-weeks 2-4 plan: one in-person trip to Madrid (FEP) and one remote pilot with a UAE partner club, both with named contacts and gating outcomes.

nice_to_have_bullets.ru: Английский для работы с зарубежными подрядчиками/партнёрами
nice_to_have_bullets.en: English for working with foreign contractors and partners
nice_to_have_bullets.rationale: The full investor-grade research brief and methodology page are authored in professional English. Voice discipline (third-person, no first-person leaks) is enforced by the candidate's own pipeline.

summary.most_defensible_strong: NTH-2 — Experience launching a product with an AI/ML/CV component. Verifiable artefact on a public URL, visible OSS anchor, named model routing strategy, explicit kill-signals per value-mechanic.
summary.highest_probe_risk: NTH-4 — Personal interest in padel or playing experience. Explicitly marked GAP; expect direct probing in the screening. Closure plan must be delivered on the call rather than deferred.

conversation_pivots.name: Fresh-JTBD-lens pivot
trigger_question_examples: How do you understand the player if you have never been on court?
Are you a paying user of any of the competitors?
conversation_pivots.bridge_sentence: The first asset a Product Lead can bring to a domain that is still in the AURA 'understanding' stage is a clean JTBD lens that is not pre-loaded with category beliefs.
conversation_pivots.proof_point: The four core jobs in evidence/20260501T135005Z/00_blueprint.json were written without a player's bias and survived the red-team pass. The closure plan is explicit: clinic in role-week 1, two coach shadows per week, a named coach co-creation contract by role-week 4 — see reports/interview_pack/deliverables/03_mvp_loop_design.md.

conversation_pivots.name: Hallucination-free product builder pivot
trigger_question_examples: Have you launched a product from zero?
What ships first when you join?
How do you avoid building the wrong thing in an unfamiliar domain?
conversation_pivots.bridge_sentence: Shipping in an unfamiliar domain is a citation-discipline problem, not a courage problem.
conversation_pivots.proof_point: The padel-research-os pipeline enforces VERIFIED / INFERRED / ABSENT tagging, fails the build on any unsourced number, and routes every numeric claim through a Python sandbox. The same gates can run inside the product against analytics events on day one. See https://github.com/avaluev/padel-market-analysis/blob/main/scripts/check_citations.py and CLAUDE.md hard rules.

conversation_pivots.name: Kill-criterion-first roadmap pivot
trigger_question_examples: How will you know whether the rating idea is real?
What is the first three-month milestone?
conversation_pivots.bridge_sentence: A roadmap that does not name what would kill it is not a roadmap, it is a wishlist.
conversation_pivots.proof_point: The blueprint pre-declares four kill experiments — smartphone-only rating acceptance, coach pilot completion, FIP organiser LOI, OSS pipeline reproducibility — each with hypothesis, kill-criterion, and evidence-required. Sibling brief 04_30_60_90_plan.md sequences them into role-weeks. See evidence/20260501T135005Z/00_blueprint.json#kill_experiments.
